name: stackra/container
purpose: DI container utilities. Ships #[Overrides] class attribute plus HasDiscovery trait to bind concretes over vendor abstracts unreachable to Laravel's #[Bind].
capabilities: HasDiscovery trait for boot-time attribute scanning
Repeatable across multiple abstracts on one concrete
when_to_use: You need to swap a vendor / third-party class in the container and cannot annotate it with Laravel's #[Bind] attribute.
when_not_to_use: When you own the abstract, use Illuminate\Container\Attributes\Bind on the interface directly instead.
